description: A customer at a trendy café is irate because their avocado toast has too much chili flakes and not enough lime. They demand police arrest the chef for culinary malpractice.
initial_variations: I need the police immediately! My avocado toast is ruined with {specific_details} at {address_location}!
Hello, this is an emergency! The chef at {restaurant_name} put {specific_details} on my toast. I demand justice!
This is {caller_name}. I'm at {address_location} and I'm being served inedible food! Send someone now!
I can't believe this! {specific_details} on my avocado toast? This is a crime against brunch!

initial: I'm at {address_location}, it's that café with the ugly neon sign.
I told you, {address_location}! How many times do I have to repeat myself?
complaining: Still at {address_location}, and now my toast is getting cold!
Same place, {address_location}. Are you coming or not?
demanding: I'm outside {address_location} now, waiting for an officer. This is ridiculous.
I'm at {address_location}. If you don't send someone, I'm calling my lawyer.
escalated: I've moved to the sidewalk at {address_location}. This is a public safety issue!
I'm at {address_location} and I've taken photos. This will go viral.

initial: It's about my avocado toast! {specific_details}. It's completely unacceptable.
The chef put {specific_details} on my order. I specifically asked for no chili flakes.
complaining: I've already said: {specific_details}. Are you not listening?
The problem is {specific_details}. I demand a refund and an apology.
demanding: I want the chef arrested for assault with a deadly spice.
This is about {specific_details}. It's a matter of principle.
escalated: The manager refused to comp my meal. Now it's about {specific_details} and the principle of customer service.

initial: No weapon, just culinary incompetence!
The only weapon is their terrible taste buds.
complaining: The weapon is the chili flakes! They're a weapon of mass destruction for my mouth.
No weapon, but the hurt is real.
demanding: I don't have a weapon, but I'll use my phone to film this injustice.
escalated: I'm not armed, but I'm armed with the truth!

initial: I'm the victim! My taste buds are traumatized.
I am the victim here. My brunch experience is ruined.
complaining: I'm the victim, and so is my stomach.
The victim is me, {caller_name}. And my avocado toast.
demanding: I'm the victim. The chef is the perpetrator.
I'm the victim of a culinary crime.
escalated: I'm the victim. And now the manager is also a victim of my wrath.

initial: The chef! I don't know his name, but he wears a stupid hat.
The suspect is the chef at {restaurant_name}.
complaining: The chef, definitely. Also the cashier for defending him.
The suspect is the line cook who spat in my food?
demanding: The chef, the manager, and anyone who thinks this toast is acceptable.
escalated: I've identified the chef. He's bald and has a tattoo of a whisk.

initial: Fine, I'll wait but I want a written apology.
Okay, I'll stay put. But this is unacceptable.
complaining: If you're not sending police, I'm posting this on Yelp.
I'll wait for a manager, but this isn't over.
demanding: I'll wait for the officer, but they better not be late.
I'm waiting, but I'm also recording this call.
escalated: Too late, I've already called the news station.
I'll wait, but only because I want to see the officer's face.

SEND_POLICE.feedback: Police responded to a trivial food complaint, wasting resources and public trust. The caller was not satisfied and posted a viral video mocking the department.

SEND_FIRE.feedback: Firefighters arrived to find a cold avocado toast. They were not amused and the department faced ridicule.

SEND_MEDICAL.feedback: Paramedics checked the caller for allergic reactions but found none. The caller was embarrassed but grateful for the attention.

ANIMAL_CONTROL.feedback: Animal control arrived and the caller demanded they take the chef away. They left after realizing there were no animals involved.

DISMISS.feedback: Correctly determined the call was non-emergency. Caller was redirected to the restaurant's complaint line. Resources saved.

description: A person is furious because a cloud in the sky is shaped like a duck instead of a rabbit, ruining their day. They demand police arrest the weather or change it.
initial_variations: 911? I need help! The cloud at {address_location} is shaped like {specific_details} and it's offensive!
This is {caller_name}. I'm looking at the sky above {address_location} and there's a cloud that looks like {specific_details} instead of a rabbit!
I demand you send someone to fix the cloud! It's supposed to be a rabbit, but it's {specific_details}!
Emergency! The weather is mocking me at {address_location}. That cloud is definitely {specific_details}!

initial: I'm at {location} near {address_location}. Look up!
It's {location}, the cloud is right above me.
observing: Still at {location}. The cloud hasn't moved. It's still {specific_details}.
I'm at {location}. Can you see it from there?
arguing: I told you, {location}! Are you blind or just incompetent?
At {location}. The cloud is taunting me.
resolved: I'm at {location}. But since you won't help, I'm leaving.

initial: The cloud is shaped like {specific_details}! It should be a rabbit!
I wanted to see a rabbit but it's {specific_details}. This is a mockery.
observing: It's clearly {specific_details}. I'm not imagining it. {witness_name} agrees.
The cloud is {specific_details}. It has been for 10 minutes.
arguing: How many times? It's {specific_details}! This is abuse of a sky enthusiast!
If you looked up, you'd see {specific_details}. It's obvious.
resolved: It was {specific_details}. Now it's a blob. My day is ruined.

initial: No weapon, just my disappointment.
The cloud is armed with bad shape design.
observing: No weapon, but I have a camera to document this.
I have a laser pointer, but it's for my cat.
arguing: I don't need a weapon. The cloud is the aggressor.
I have a slingshot, but I'm not using it yet.
resolved: No weapons. Just a broken spirit.

initial: I'm the victim! My visual experience is violated.
The victim is me and anyone who loves cloud watching.
observing: I'm the victim. And {witness_name} is also disturbed.
The cloud is victimizing my expectations.
arguing: I am the primary victim. The cloud is the perpetrator.
We're all victims of this cloud's poor shape choices.
resolved: I'm the victim. But I'll survive... barely.

initial: The suspect is the weather! Or maybe a government experiment.
The cloud itself is the suspect.
observing: The suspect is the cloud. It knows what it did.
Maybe it's a drone shaped like a duck? That's suspicious.
arguing: The suspect is Mother Nature. She's mocking me.
It's definitely the Illuminati controlling the clouds.
resolved: No suspect. It was just a cloud. But a mean one.

initial: Fine, I'll watch it and call back if it changes.
Okay, I'll stay and observe. But I'm not happy.
observing: I'm watching it. It's still {specific_details}. Are you sending someone?
I'll note its trajectory. But this is not over.
arguing: I will not just accept this! I demand action!
If you don't help, I'll contact the local news.
resolved: Fine, I'll let it go. But I'm writing a complaint to the weather bureau.

SEND_POLICE.feedback: Police arrived to find a person pointing at the sky. They were ridiculed by bystanders. The caller insisted on filing a report.

SEND_FIRE.feedback: Firefighters showed up with a ladder, unsure how to fix a cloud. The public laughed.

SEND_MEDICAL.feedback: Medics assessed the caller for heat stroke or hallucinations. They were fine, but the caller was annoyed by the suggestion.

ANIMAL_CONTROL.feedback: Animal control came with a net. The caller demanded they catch the duck cloud. They left shaking their heads.

DISMISS.feedback: Correctly determined the call was frivolous. The caller was advised to contact a meteorologist. Resources preserved.

title: The Overdue Library Book Complaint
description: A caller demands immediate police intervention to retrieve an overdue library book, claiming it's a 'crisis' because they need it for important research and the library is closed.

states.initial: Caller is agitated and demanding police action.
states.explaining: Caller elaborates on the severity of the overdue book situation.
states.escalating: Caller threatens to report the dispatcher for not taking the issue seriously.
states.resolved: Caller hangs up in frustration after being dismissed.

initial_variations: I need the police right now! Someone at the library refused to extend my book and now it's overdue! This is a crisis!
Hello? Is this 911? I have a serious crime happening. My library book is overdue and the library won't let me renew it online!
This is an emergency! My research is ruined because a book I checked out is due today and I can't get to the library! I need an officer to go get it for me!
Listen, I'm a taxpayer and my rights are being violated. The library system is incompetent. I demand police assistance to retrieve my property!

initial: I'm at {address_location}. The book is at {library_name}!
My home is {address_location}, but the book is at the library on {library_name}.
explaining: I already told you, {address_location}. Are you sending someone or not?
escalating: I'm not answering any more questions! Just send the police to {address_location} or the library!
resolved: Finally, you ask. It's {address_location}. But it's too late now.

initial: The book is {book_title} and it was due {due_date}. This is outrageous!
I borrowed {book_title} from {library_name}. It was due {due_date} and now I'm fined!
explaining: I need it for my research project. The library won't let me renew because someone else placed a hold. This is a crime!
escalating: I have a right to that book! I pay taxes! This is theft by the library!
resolved: Never mind. I'll handle it myself.

initial: My name is {caller_name}. I'm a respected member of this community!
explaining: I'm {caller_name}. I've already told you that!
escalating: I'm {caller_name} and I want your badge number!
resolved: I'm {caller_name}. But it doesn't matter anymore.

initial: The book is {book_title}, due {due_date}. The library is {library_name}. What more do you need?
explaining: I already gave you all the details. The book is overdue because of system error!
escalating: You're not listening! The book is {book_title}! Fine, I'll solve this myself!
resolved: I've wasted enough time. Goodbye.

SEND_POLICE.feedback: Police arrive at the library only to find a quiet building and a confused staff. The caller is cited for misuse of emergency services. PR and resources wasted.

SEND_FIRE.feedback: Fire department responds to a 'crisis' involving a library book. They find no hazard. Community outraged at frivolous call. Disciplinary action for dispatcher.

SEND_MEDICAL.feedback: Ambulance dispatched to a non-medical emergency. Real emergency delayed. Caller gets a lecture from paramedics. Public complaint filed.

ANIMAL_CONTROL.feedback: Animal control sent to retrieve a book? They politely explain that is not their job. Caller becomes irate. Minor resource waste.

DISMISS.feedback: Dispatcher professionally explains that a library overdue book is not an emergency. Caller is redirected to library services. Call resolved without incident.

title: The Cold Coffee at a Drive-Thru
description: A driver calls 911 in fury after receiving lukewarm coffee from a fast-food drive-thru, demanding an immediate police response to force the restaurant to make a fresh cup.

states.initial: Caller is irate and demanding emergency dispatch.
states.arguing: Caller debates with dispatcher about the seriousness of the issue.
states.threatening: Caller threatens to take legal action or drive recklessly.
states.disconnected: Caller hangs up after realizing the futility.

initial_variations: I just went through the drive-thru at Burger King and they gave me cold coffee! This is theft! I want the police here NOW!
911? I'm being served lukewarm coffee! This is a health hazard! Send the police to the McDonald's on Main Street!
My coffee is ice cold! I demand immediate police assistance to arrest the cashier! I'm not leaving until I get a hot cup!
This is an emergency! The coffee at Starbucks is not hot enough! I'm stuck in the drive-thru line and they refuse to fix it!

options: McDonald's at the corner of 5th and Main

initial: I'm at {address_location}. I'm trapped in the drive-thru!
I'm at the {address_location} drive-thru. Send help!
arguing: I told you, {address_location}! Are you deaf?
threatening: I'll drive to {address_location} and cause a scene if you don't act!

initial: It's my {beverage_type}. It's {temperature_complaint}! This is unacceptable!
I ordered {beverage_type} but it's {temperature_complaint}. I demand a new one!
arguing: I already told you, my {beverage_type} is {temperature_complaint}. This is fraud!
threatening: If you don't send police, I'll throw this {beverage_type} at the manager!
disconnected: I don't have time for this. I'm dumping it.

initial: My name is {caller_name}. I want the manager arrested!
I'm {caller_name}, a loyal customer. This is a betrayal!
arguing: I'm {caller_name}. What kind of service is this?
threatening: {caller_name} will have your job for this!
disconnected: Never mind my name. I'm done.

initial: I have {order_number}. The {beverage_type} is {temperature_complaint}. What else do you need?
arguing: I already gave the details! {order_number} at {address_location}!
disconnected: I'm hanging up. I'll fix this myself.

SEND_POLICE.feedback: Police respond to a drive-thru for a coffee complaint. The caller is cited for misuse of 911. The restaurant is annoyed. Negative media coverage.

SEND_FIRE.feedback: Firefighters arrive expecting a fire, find a cold coffee. Their time is wasted. Fire chief files a complaint.

SEND_MEDICAL.feedback: Ambulance dispatched for lukewarm coffee. No medical need. Paramedics are furious. Real emergency possibly delayed.

ANIMAL_CONTROL.feedback: Animal control sent to a drive-thru. They find no animals. Caller is confused. Minor resources used.

DISMISS.feedback: Dispatcher explains that cold coffee is not an emergency. Caller is advised to speak to the manager. Call resolved.

title: The Wrongly Colored Paint
description: A homeowner calls 911 because the paint color in their living room is wrong, demanding an emergency repaint by the fire department or police.

states.initial: Caller is hysterical about the paint color.
states.explaining: Caller details the paint color discrepancy.
states.demanding: Caller makes absurd demands for emergency action.
states.resigned: Caller gives up after being dismissed.

initial_variations: I just painted my living room and it's the wrong color! This is a disaster! I need the fire department here to repaint it immediately!
911? My living room is supposed to be 'Gentle Sky' but it looks like 'Stormy Gray'! This is a crime! Send someone now!
I can't live in a room with this color! It's making me sick! I need an emergency painter or police to arrest the paint store!
The paint is completely off! This is false advertising! I want a SWAT team to force the store to fix it!

initial: My house at {address_location}! The {room} is ruined!
I'm at {address_location}. The {room} is a disaster!
explaining: I told you, {address_location}! The {room} is the wrong color!
demanding: Send the fire truck to {address_location} with paint! Now!
resigned: Whatever. The address is {address_location}, but I guess you don't care.

initial: I wanted {expected_color} but I got {actual_color}! In my {room}! This is a huge deal!
The {room} was supposed to be {expected_color} but it's {actual_color}. My whole decor is ruined!
explaining: It's {actual_color} instead of {expected_color}. Do you not understand color?
demanding: I need you to send people to repaint the {room} to {expected_color}. Now!
resigned: It's {actual_color}. I'll have to fix it myself.

initial: My name is {caller_name}. I'm a homeowner, and this is unacceptable!
I'm {caller_name}. I demand action!
explaining: {caller_name} here. I already gave my name.
demanding: This is {caller_name} and I'm not backing down!

initial: I painted the {room} myself. I bought paint that was supposed to be {expected_color}. It's {actual_color}. False advertising!
explaining: The can said {expected_color} but it dried as {actual_color}. I have the receipt.
demanding: I told you everything! Just send someone to repaint it!
resigned: I'm done. I'll call a lawyer.

SEND_POLICE.feedback: Police arrive to find a distressed homeowner over paint color. They explain it's not a crime. Caller tries to file a report. Waste of resources.

SEND_FIRE.feedback: Fire department arrives with hoses, expecting a fire. They are asked to repaint. Firefighters are bemused. Department reprimanded.

SEND_MEDICAL.feedback: Ambulance arrives for a 'medical emergency' that is just paint dissatisfaction. Paramedics leave frustrated. Legal issues.

ANIMAL_CONTROL.feedback: Animal control officer shows up, confused. Caller yells about paint. Officer leaves. Minor time waste.

DISMISS.feedback: Dispatcher calms caller, explains that paint color is not an emergency. Suggests contacting the store. Call resolved.

title: The Missing Sock from Laundry
description: A caller reports a missing sock as a burglary, insisting the police investigate their neighbor who they believe stole it from the laundry room.

states.initial: Caller is accusing the neighbor of sock theft.
states.insistent: Caller demands police action despite logic.

initial_variations: I need the police! My neighbor stole one of my socks from the laundry room! I know it was him!
This is an emergency! A sock of mine has gone missing and I suspect the guy next door. I want him arrested!
911? There's a thief in my building! He took my lucky sock from the dryer! Send cops now!
I'm reporting a theft! My favorite sock is gone, and that weirdo in 2B must have taken it!

options: a red and white striped sock
a black ankle sock with a hole
he was looking at my laundry
I saw him with a sock in his hand

initial: I'm at {address_location}. The laundry room is in the basement.
I live in {address_location}. The crime scene is the laundry room!
It's {sock_description}. It's been missing since yesterday. My neighbor {neighbor_name} is the culprit!
My {sock_description} is gone. I suspect {neighbor_name}.
insistent: I already told you, {sock_description} taken by {neighbor_name}. Just arrest him!
defeated: It's {sock_description}. I'll never see it again.

initial: My name is {caller_name}. I'm a victim of sock theft!
I'm {caller_name}. This is a serious crime!
The sock is {sock_description}. I left it in the dryer and {neighbor_name} was nearby. {evidence}.
I have {evidence}. That should be enough for a warrant!
suspicious: I have {evidence}. What more do you need?
insistent: I've told you everything! The sock, the neighbor, the evidence!

SEND_POLICE.feedback: Police arrive and interview the neighbor about a missing sock. Neighbor is annoyed. Caller is cited for false report. Media picks up the story.

SEND_FIRE.feedback: Firefighters show up to a 'sock emergency'. They are embarrassed. Department gets ridiculed.

SEND_MEDICAL.feedback: Ambulance dispatched for a sock theft? Paramedics file a complaint. No medical need.

ANIMAL_CONTROL.feedback: Animal control officer asks about animals. Caller insists it's a sock. Officer leaves after explaining jurisdiction.

DISMISS.feedback: Dispatcher explains missing socks are not a police matter. Caller is advised to check their laundry or buy new socks. Call handled.

title: The Wi-Fi Slowdown
description: A telecommuter calls 911 because their internet is lagging during an important online game, demanding immediate emergency technical support.

states.frustrated: Caller expresses anger at the inconvenience.
states.pleading: Caller begs for help despite explanation.

initial_variations: My internet is so slow! I'm about to lose a ranked match! This is a crisis! I need someone to fix it now!
911? My Wi-Fi is completely lagging! I can't even play my game! Send technical support immediately!
This is an emergency! My latency is over 200 ms! I need a police officer to come troubleshoot my router!
I'm a professional gamer and my stream is buffering! This is costing me money! I demand emergency action!

initial: I'm at {address_location}. Hurry, my game is on the line!
My place is {address_location}. Send a tech!
frustrated: I already said {address_location}! Are you even listening?
giving_up: It's {address_location}. But you guys are useless.

initial: I'm playing {game_name} and I have {lag_measurement}. My ISP is {isp}. Fix it!
My internet is {lag_measurement} while playing {game_name}. This is ruining my gaming experience!
frustrated: I told you, {lag_measurement} in {game_name}! It's unplayable!
pleading: Just help me with the {lag_measurement} issue! I'm begging you!
giving_up: Forget the details. You can't help.

initial: My name is {caller_name}. I'm a top player!
I'm {caller_name}. This is hurting my rank!
frustrated: {caller_name}. And I'm losing because of you!

initial: My ISP is {isp}. I have {lag_measurement}. The game is {game_name}. Do something!
I'm on {isp}. They won't help. That's why I called 911!
frustrated: I've given you all the info! {isp}, {lag_measurement}, {game_name}!
pleading: I told you everything. {isp} said to call 911 for emergencies!

SEND_POLICE.feedback: Police arrive to find a gamer stressed about lag. They explain it's not a police matter. Caller is upset. Negative PR.

SEND_FIRE.feedback: Firefighters try to diagnose network issues. They are not IT. Time wasted. Department gets mocked online.

SEND_MEDICAL.feedback: Ambulance dispatched for 'lag' emergency. Paramedics find no medical issue. Waste of life-saving resources.

ANIMAL_CONTROL.feedback: Animal control officer has no animals to handle. Leaves confused. Caller yells about Wi-Fi.

DISMISS.feedback: Dispatcher tells caller to restart router and contact ISP. Caller reluctantly agrees. No resources wasted.

states.frustrated: Caller is exasperated that their complaint is not being treated as a crime.

This is outrageous! My {food_item} is cold. I need an officer here NOW for this criminal negligence.
Hello? I want to report a crime. My {order} is cold. The driver should be arrested.

Just the temperature issue? Anything else?

SEND_POLICE.message: Police respond to a restaurant, find a salad without croutons. The caller is irate. Officers advise it's a civil matter. Wasted resources.

SEND_FIRE.message: Firefighters show up, see a salad. They have no solution. Caller demands they add croutons. Unprofessional.

SEND_MEDICAL.message: Ambulance arrives for a missing crouton emergency. Paramedics are speechless. Caller pretends to have allergic reaction to the absence. Misuse.

ANIMAL_CONTROL.message: Animal control officer arrives, no animal. They recommend talking to manager. Caller is confused but eventually stops.

DISMISS.message: Dispatcher suggests speaking to the restaurant manager. Caller demands police but after a few minutes, agrees to talk to staff. No emergency.

title: The Gourmet Burger Complaint
initial_variations: I need police immediately! My {burger_type} burger is completely ruined! They gave it medium-well when I ordered medium-rare!
This is an emergency! The chef at {restaurant_name} refuses to remake my burger correctly. I demand justice!
I'm a paying customer! I ordered a {burger_type} burger and they messed it up. Send someone to arrest the cook!
This is unacceptable! My {burger_type} burger is dry. I want the manager arrested for culinary crimes!

It's the {restaurant_name} near the mall.
I'm at {restaurant_name}, hurry!

Same place, {restaurant_name}, they're laughing at me.
threatening: I'm not leaving {restaurant_name} until someone is arrested!
I'm at {restaurant_name} and I'm about to lose it.
resigned: I'm at {restaurant_name}, but I guess I'll just leave.

escalating: I asked for medium-rare, this is well-done. {ambient_audio} is driving me crazy.
threatening: If I don't get a new burger, I'm calling the health department! {ambient_audio}
resigned: Never mind, they gave me a refund. But still, this is bad service.

threatening: I'm safe, but they won't be if they don't fix this!

SEND_POLICE.feedback: Police arrived to find a customer arguing over a burger. A waste of resources.

SEND_FIRE.feedback: Fire department responded to a non-emergency food complaint.

SEND_MEDICAL.feedback: Medical unit dispatched for a non-injury burger dispute.

ANIMAL_CONTROL.feedback: Animal control sent to a burger joint; no animals involved.

DISMISS.feedback: Advised caller to speak with the manager. Call resolved without emergency response.
